session.user:
Run the following commands in /home/runner/work/erk/erk and report results:
1. `uv run ruff check --fix src/erk/cli/commands/navigation_helpers.py packages/erk-slots/src/erk_slots/navigation.py tests/unit/cli/test_navigation_helpers.py` 2. `uv run ruff check packages/erk-slots/tests/unit/test_down_cmd.py packages/erk-slots/tests/unit/test_up_cmd.py packages/erk-slots/tests/unit/test_stack_navigation.py` 3. `uv run ruff check src/ packages/ tests/unit/cli/test_graphite_command.py tests/unit/cli/test_help_formatter.py` (overall lint check)
Report any remaining errors (do NOT run --fix on the test files). Just report what's failing.
session.assistant: I'll run these ruff checks in sequence and report the results.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run ruff check --fix on navigation-related files

session.assistant: Good! Now checking the erk-slots test files:

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run ruff check on erk-slots test files

session.tool_result:
Exit code 1 E501 Line too long (103 > 100) --> packages/erk-slots/tests/unit/test_down_cmd.py:73:101 | 71 | ) 72 | 73 | result = runner.invoke(cli, ["slot", "down", "--script"], obj=test_ctx, catch_exceptions=False) | ^^^ 74 | 75 | assert result.exit_code == 0 |
E501 Line too long (103 > 100) --> packages/erk-slots/tests/unit/test_down_cmd.py:117:101 | 116 | # Navigate down from feature-1 to root (main) 117 | result = runner.invoke(cli, ["slot", "down", "--script"], obj=test_ctx, catch_exceptions=False) | ^^^ 118 | 119 | assert result.exit_code == 0 |
E501 Line too long (103 > 100) --> packages/erk-slots/tests/unit/test_down_cmd.py:191:101 | 189 | ) 190 | 191 | result = runner.invoke(cli, ["slot", "down", "--script"], obj=test_ctx, catch_exceptions=False) | ^^^ 192 |

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: uv run ruff check src/ packages/ tests/unit/cli/test_graphite_command.py tests/unit/cli/test_help_formatter.py

session.assistant:
## Summary
**Command 1 - PASSED**: Navigation-related files fixed successfully - `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/src/erk/cli/commands/navigation_helpers.py` - `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/packages/erk-slots/src/erk_slots/navigation.py` - `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/tests/unit/cli/test_navigation_helpers.py`
**Command 2 & 3 - FAILED**: 27 remaining E501 (line too long) errors in erk-slots test files
All errors are **E501 line length violations** (lines exceeding 100 character limit). The violations are in: - `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/packages/erk-slots/tests/unit/test_down_cmd.py`: 12 violations (lines 73, 117, 191, 284, 358, 938, 980, 1019, 1061, 1310, 1447) - `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/packages/erk-slots/tests/unit/test_up_cmd.py`: 10 violations (lines 78, 167, 317, 442, 1079, 1121, 1160, 1202, 1422) - `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/packages/erk-slots/tests/unit/test_stack_navigation.py`: 5 violations (lines 56, 176, 278, 425, 496)
All violations involve long `runner.invoke()` call lines with the `catch_exceptions=False` parameter extending past the 100-character limit.
